title: Joan Stransky
compiled_truth: Joan Stransky is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-27 to 2001-12-03), Joan Stransky sent 9 and received 164 emails, totalling 173 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (5), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (5), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (3), [Margaret Carson](people/margaret-carson) (3), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (3).
